expectations.text: References PipelineContext.from_config() or imports from paper_tool
expectations.evidence: Imports PipelineContext from paper_tool.config, download_paper/extract_paper_text from paper_tool.pipeline, LLMClassifier/LLMSummarizer/LLMAnalyzer from respective modules, NotionService from paper_tool.notion_service

expectations.text: Mentions download_paper() or composable pipeline step functions
expectations.evidence: Shows both run_pipeline() shortcut and full 8-step composable workflow with download_paper(), extract_paper_text(), classifier.classify(), summarizer.summarize(), analyzer.analyze(), notion.append_note_with_figures()

expectations.text: Explains what the pipeline does (download, extract, analyze, write to Notion)
expectations.evidence: Lists 8 numbered steps: download, extract text/figures, create Notion page, classify, summarize, translate captions, LLM analysis, write note with figures

expectations.text: Response is actionable with importable/callable Python code
expectations.evidence: Provides complete copy-pasteable Python code with all necessary imports and ctx = PipelineContext.from_config() initialization
